# Listener-cleanup allowlist
#
# Files in src/ui/components/** that are exempt from the
# `addEventListener(..., { signal })` requirement until they are
# migrated. See:
#   - docs/design/listener-cleanup-standardisation.md
#   - tests/listener-cleanup.test.ts
#
# Format: one repo-relative path per line. Blank lines and lines
# starting with `#` are ignored.
#
# Each migration commit MUST remove exactly one line from this file in
# the same commit that swaps the file's bindings to use { signal }.
# The test will fail if a path here:
#   - no longer exists, or
#   - has zero addEventListener calls, or
#   - is already compliant with the convention.
# That keeps this file a true ratchet: tightening only, never loosening.
#
# When this list is empty, delete the file altogether. The test will
# then enforce the convention on every file in src/ui/components/**.

src/ui/components/review/AnnotationPopover.ts
src/ui/components/review/AnnotationStore.ts
src/ui/components/review/ReviewDocument.ts
src/ui/components/review/ReviewPane.ts
src/ui/components/sandbox/ConsoleRuntimeProvider.ts
src/ui/components/sandbox/RuntimeMessageRouter.ts
